title: Vendor Workshop in Nome!
summary: Vendors for the Nome Blueberry Festival are now offered the ability to sign up for a NO COST vendor workshop with voyij.com. Space is limited. Workshop will be August 23rd from 1pm-3pm at the North West Campus Nagozruk Room. Register by August 19th with Alice Bioff. Call 907-304-1154 or email abioff...
